meaning: 比夫拉[尼日利亚东南部一地区] ;比夫拉湾(几内亚湾一部分,靠西非的赤道几内亚、喀麦隆和尼日利亚等国)
examples: I remember my first exposure way back in the 60s was a photo of the Biafra famine in the civil war in Nigeria.
1970 - Biafra capitulates, ending the Nigerian civil war.
By year's end the federal side had taken more than half of Biafra's territory.
He had acted as roving cultural ambassador for Biafra at the time, but for more than 40 years he remained silent about his war experiences.
